data.name: Orbbec Unveils Robot-Free Data Collection Hardware Platform to Help Customers Capture Real-World Demonstrations for Physical AI at Scale

data.description: Orbbec Unveils Robot-Free Data Collection Hardware Platform to Help Customers Capture Real-World Demonstrations for Physical AI at Scale discusses Embodied General Intelligence.
Orbbec Unveils Robot-Free Data Collection Hardware Platform to Help Customers Capture Real-World Demonstrations for Physical AI at Scale uses Industrial Manufacturing.
Orbbec Unveils Robot-Free Data Collection Hardware Platform to Help Customers Capture Real-World Demonstrations for Physical AI at Scale discusses Data Flywheel.
